about.title: About the club
about.intro: A sports club with a community soul in the heart of Magaluf.
about.body: Magaluf Sport Club is much more than padel: 7 courts, a 7-a-side football pitch, café bar and kids area all in one place. A spot to play, compete and enjoy with family or friends, all year round.

muchomas.title: Much more than padel
muchomas.desc: Tournaments, social meetups, a padel school with private and group classes, and a 7-a-side football pitch for all kinds of use. A club that's alive on and off the court.

team.title: Pros who help you improve
team.intro: All our coaches are accredited by the Gustavo Pratto Academy, ensuring a common methodology and structured teaching.

maxi.bio: Sporting Director and head of the development of The Padel Performance Method®. Leads sporting planning, coach training and the club's programmes.

angel.bio: Regular Second Division player and one of the top competitive players in Mallorca. Specialist in competition training and tactical development.

miki.bio: Former high-performance athlete with wide competition experience. Specialist in technique work, private lessons and small groups.

silvia.bio: In charge of customer care, booking coordination and student follow-up. The club's first point of contact.

method.title: The Padel Performance Method®
method.intro: Improving as a player isn't only about time on court. Real progress comes when methodology, coaches, technology and real play work together. That's why we developed our own method, designed to speed up learning, improve performance and deliver measurable results.

pillars.title: Coach
pillars.desc: Learn with qualified coaches and a structured methodology.

pillars.title: Repeat
pillars.desc: Automate movements with quality repetitions and specific technology.

pillars.title: Play
pillars.desc: Apply what you learn in real game situations.

pillars.title: Analyse
pillars.desc: Measure and analyse your performance with video, data and technology.

pillars.title: Improve
pillars.desc: Turn learning into real, measurable improvement.

tech.name: PUSUN®
tech.desc: Our high-precision ball-machine training system. Continuous sequences of 50+ balls with the same pattern, multiplying quality repetitions per session.

tech.name: AIBALL®
tech.desc: Our AI-powered recording and analysis system. Record training and matches to analyse performance with objective statistics and tactical analysis.

certification.title: Accredited by the Gustavo Pratto Academy
certification.desc: All our coaches are accredited by the Gustavo Pratto Academy, one of the most prestigious and internationally recognised padel teaching methodologies. It guarantees structured, progressive teaching focused on player improvement.

method.campsIntro: A journey through levels, from fundamentals to high performance.

camps.name: Performance Camp 3
camps.label: Essentials
camps.goal: Build a solid technical base and develop the tactical fundamentals of the game.

camps.name: Performance Camp 4
camps.label: Development
camps.goal: Develop technique, improve tactics and decision-making.

camps.name: Performance Camp 5
camps.label: Competition
camps.goal: Prepare the player to compete with greater guarantees.

method.campsNote: Programmes in development. Request information about levels and availability.
